site_name: Kivunge (Unguja Island) and Micheweni (Pemba Island), Zanzibar
location_method: Approximate midpoint between the two study sites (Kivunge, northern Unguja; Micheweni, northern Pemba)
location_notes: Two health care units used: Kivunge (Unguja ~-5.95,39.28) and Micheweni (Pemba ~-4.98,39.83). Paper pools baseline molecular data across both sites without per-site breakdown, so a single survey is created using an approximate central coordinate between the two sites.
time_method: Study enrollment period stated as October 2002 to February 2003; midpoint used.
time_notes: Baseline (day 0, pretreatment) samples used for extraction. Post-treatment recurrent samples not extracted as separate frequency estimates (they represent selected/recurrent parasites, not a population survey).
